demoted_from_raw_rtl_json_bit_for_bit_lo.reason: RTL exposes mstatus and selected CSR lanes; csr_status remains a formal abstraction lane in coq/kami_hw/Abstraction.v and coq/kami_hw/FullAbstraction.v rather than a distinct raw cosim JSON register.

demoted_from_raw_rtl_json_bit_for_bit_lo.field: declared full-memory extent beyond emitted hardware memory
demoted_from_raw_rtl_json_bit_for_bit_lo.reason: RTL cosim emits the concrete 4096-word hardware data memory extent; VMState keeps a 65536-word software memory list. Bitlock compares the emitted hardware extent/prefix and treats un-emitted tail equality as a formal abstraction responsibility.
The VM graph carries VMAxiom strings; RTL carries bounded descriptor/table state and module-region shadows, not Coq string payloads in raw JSON.

RTL cosim now emits bounded module and morphism graph surfaces, but high-level PartitionGraph equality is discharged through the formal FullAbstraction/FullEmbedStep bridge rather than raw JSON bit-for-bit equality for every graph encoding.
